highlights.description: Initial release of omnidxi - batteries-included DXI client for Go
MultiTracker for sending events to multiple providers simultaneously
Bundled Amplitude and Mixpanel provider adapters

added.description: Re-exports of all core types from omnidxi-core
MultiTracker for multi-provider event dispatch with aggregated error handling
Thread-safe Add method for runtime provider addition
NoopTracker for testing and disabled scenarios

documentation.description: README with quick start, architecture diagram, and provider reference
